scenario: R1 max_age dead-code removal regression (bulk, behavior-neutral)
warning_text: [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.
notes: windows-mcp AVAILABLE and used (GUI). Pasted PII via clipboard, verified full text in composer, then submitted via a REAL left-click on the send (paper-plane) button (NOT synthetic Enter) using Win32 SetCursorPos+mouse_event. Key DPI finding: windows-mcp Snapshot reports PHYSICAL coords (1914px screen) but Win32 SetCursorPos uses LOGICAL coords (physical/1.25 at 125% scaling) — send button physical (1581,579) = logical (1265,463). After click, SSE stream completed; ChatGLM answer area rendered the block warning containing '보안 정책'. Engine intercept fired, answer-area block end-to-end visible.
